scripts.build: bun run --filter @alesha-nov/config build && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/email build && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/auth build && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/auth-web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @alesha-nov/config typecheck && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/email typecheck && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/auth typecheck && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/auth-web typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --filter @alesha-nov/config lint && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/email lint && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/auth lint && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/auth-web lint
scripts.test: bun run --filter @alesha-nov/config test && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/email test && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/auth test && bun run --filter @alesha-nov/auth-web test
